name: Nure-Onna
description:
"🐍"

It's raining a lot and you really wanna get home already before you get a cold, so you sit at a bus stop to wait for your way back home to arrive. What's the worst that could happen in such an ordinary situation?

Keeping the spooky bots coming. This one doesn't have a particular backstory or anything so she was easy to make. I know Nure-Onna are a popular japanese legend, but this one design is specifically from Nioh, though the scenario is the present, not the samurai era.

[Art from krekk0v and Niur]
creator: forcedattrition
